title: Quartz pack
description: Adds custom tools and weapons in quartz like theme
body:
Quartz pack - is a resource pack that adds custom tools and weapons in quartz like theme.

If you are bored with the vanilla textures of your gear, the quartz pack will help you update your look by changing any armor and tools (except leather armor) into quartz gear. This pack works only with optifine and adds the function of changing the texture of armor and tools by renaming. 
Rename list for texture changes:

Sword - Quartz sword

Pickaxe - Quartz pickaxe

Axe - Quartz axe

Shovel - Quartz shovel

Hoe - Quartz hoe

Fishing rod - Quartz fishing rod

Helmet - Quartz helmet

Chestplate - Quartz chestplate

Leggings - Quartz leggings

Boots - Quartz boots

Bow - Quartz bow

Crossbow - Quartz crossbow

Visit my twitter page: https://twitter.com/insanisart

My sketchfab: https://sketchfab.com/insanis_art
